personalInfo.name: MIKITA KAVALIOU
personalInfo.title: Full-Stack Engineer | Next.js, TypeScript & AI
personalInfo.professionalObjective: Senior Full-Stack Engineer specializing in Next.js 15, TypeScript, and AI orchestration. Expert in legacy system modernization, SQL optimization (60% latency reduction), and fault-tolerant LLM architectures for high-scale SaaS platforms.
personalInfo.status: Based in Grenoble, France. Available for immediate start.

experience.title: Full Stack Software Engineer
responsibilities: Led the technical transition to TypeScript and Clean Architecture, reducing post-deployment bugs and accelerating code review turnaround by 40% through technical mentoring of 3 junior developers.
Architected and led the migration of a legacy PHP system to a decoupled stack (Next.js/Node.js), optimizing platform scalability and ensuring long-term maintainability.
Presented technical decisions to stakeholders, translating complex improvements (30% speedup, +5% conversion) into business-value language.
Containerized micro-services with Docker, deploying to AWS Lambda with auto-scaling to handle production traffic spikes across distributed environments.
Implemented a comprehensive E2E test suite (Playwright) covering 80% of critical user paths, reducing production regressions by 35%.

experience.title: Lead Developer & Architect — Lexity
responsibilities: Designed and deployed a full-stack AI language learning platform (Next.js 15, TypeScript, Prisma, PostgreSQL) with RAG-based contextual feedback and AES-256-GCM encryption.
Built a fault-tolerant LLM executor with API key rotation and exponential backoff retry, maintaining 99.9% uptime despite strict rate limits.

experience.title: Lead Developer & Architect — ZIRO.FIT
responsibilities: Architected a B2B2C fitness marketplace with multi-party payment routing via Stripe Connect and geolocation-based discovery (Leaflet).
Rewrote and optimized complex SQL queries (json_agg, LATERAL JOINs), reducing load latency by 60% and driving a direct increase in conversion rates.

experience.title: Lead Developer & Architect — Interly
responsibilities: Built an AI voice coaching platform leveraging Web Audio API and Google Speech-to-Text for real-time voice processing.
Set up CI/CD pipelines with Docker and Vercel, reducing deployment cycles from manual processes to automated zero-downtime releases.
Defined product roadmap and technical specifications for international clients, translating complex AI capabilities into clear requirements that accelerated development by 30%.

experience.title: Junior Full-Stack Developer
responsibilities: Developed and maintained critical application modules in a microservices architecture within Agile/Scrum environment, collaborating on sprint planning, stand-ups, and code reviews.
Contributed to code review standardization processes, raising overall team code quality and accelerating new developer onboarding.

education.degree: Engineering Degree in Radio-Electronics — Master's Equivalent (Bac+4)
